code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut stopped = false
  while i < n and not stopped
    # skip whitespace
    mut ws = true
    while ws
      if i >= n
        ws = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          -1
        end
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          ws = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i >= n
      stopped = true
    else
      # read token
      mut start = i
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
          when Some(x)
            x
          when None
            -1
          end
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            reading = false
          else
            i = i + 1
          end
        end
      end
      let token = string.substring(input, start, i)
      if string.is_empty(token)
        stopped = true
      else
        let v = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if v < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
